title: Senganthal Kaiyaale Lyrics Rowthiram Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Haricharan
Lyrics: Lalith Anand 
Music: Prakash Nkki
Song: Senganthal Kaiyaale
Movie: Rowthiram

Senganthal Kaiyaale, uyirai thottu ponal
Oru senthoora aagaayam, kannil thandhu ponal
Oyaadha poothooral, Ulle ootri ponal
Aval thozhsaayindhu naan pesa, aasai mootu ponal
Palagiya naatkal ellame, ahzgaai maatri ponale
Palamurai avalai paarthaalum, adanga aaval koduthale

Eeram, manadhoram, nadhi nadhiena thaana vandhaal
Dhooram vegu thooram,oru ahzayena thaana theendi chendral

Senganthal Kaiyaale, uyirai thottu ponal
Oru senthoora aagaayam, kannil thandhu ponal
Oyaadha poothooral, Ulle ootri ponal
Aval thozhsaayindhu naan pesa, aasai mootu ponal

Edho pola aanen, yedhanaale maari ponen
Eman pole kollum paarvai
Ennai urasumpodhum uyir vazhkiren
Ada yaarai thaandum pozhudhum, Edhum thondridathu
Avalai paarkum pozhuthu
Emn kaalgal thaandi pogathu

Netru paartha nila ettaadha thooram thooram
Yeno yeno indru en kaigal neetum thooram 
Kaatril pogum ilai aanene aeno naanum
Thooki ponaaii ennai engeyo ponen naanum

Thaedi dhinam thaedi, 
udai udithidum maatram Thandhaal thandhaal
Mayam idhu thaano, 
en nizhalukum vannam en vandhadho..

Kootam koodum saalai, viral korthu pogum velai
Palar paarthu pogum pothum, adhu 
Thanimai pola en thondrutho
Aval koondhal aada thaane, thozhil medai ketpem
Melidhaai theendum podhu, 
Siridhaaga garvam kolvene

Theeyil seitha kangal en nenjai yetti paarkum
Poovil neitha keigal ethotho ennai ketkum
Vaanavilin 7zhu vanamthaan saayam pogum
Vellai megam aval ellora thooru pogum

Eeram, manadhoram, nadhi nadhiena thaana vandhaal
Dhooram vegu thooram,oru ahzayena thaana theendi chendral

Palagiya naatkal ellame, ahzgaai maatri ponale
Palamurai avalai paarthaalum, adanga aaval koduthale

Vaanam, adhan thaagam, 
kadal kudithidum kaalam vandhaal vandhaal
Neram, veguneram
udan nadhidum aasai thandhaal thandhaal

Senganthal Kaiyaale, uyirai thottu ponal
Oru senthoora aagaayam, kannil thandhu ponal
Oyaadha poothooral, Ulle ootri ponal
Aval thozhsaayindhu naan pesa, aasai mootu ponal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Senganthal Kaiyaale?

The song Senganthal Kaiyaale expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic connections.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Rowthiram?

In Rowthiram, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's feelings for his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Haricharan and composed by Prakash Nikki.

When was Senganthal Kaiyaale released?

The song was released on July 20, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Senganthal Kaiyaale, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, capturing the essence of love and nostalgia. The song's soothing melody and evocative lyrics create a romantic atmosphere, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. It beautifully conveys the longing and affection that often accompany deep relationships. Overall, this track resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Senganthal Kaiyaale from Rowthiram is a captivating melody that beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and longing. With Haricharan's soulful vocals and Lalith Anand's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The collaboration with Prakash Nikki's enchanting music makes it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: With the touch of the fragrant hand, if life is taken away, it becomes a beautiful sky. If given in the eyes, it becomes a flower that doesn't fade. If it enters the heart, it becomes a wish that speaks. All the days of the past change into a beautiful form. Even if I see her, she gives me everything.
If the river flows, it brings a cool breeze. If it comes from afar, it brings a distant sound like a gentle breeze.

With the touch of the fragrant hand, if life is taken away, it becomes a beautiful sky. If given in the eyes, it becomes a flower that doesn't fade. If it enters the heart, it becomes a wish that speaks.
I have become something, I have changed in some way. Like a shadow, my gaze captures. When I embrace, I feel alive. No matter who it is, nothing has changed. When I see her, my feet don't move away.
Yesterday's moon is far away. Today, my hands reach out for something. The leaves in the wind seem to say something, and I wonder where I have gone.
Searching every day, only the change remains. Is this the shadow of my existence? Did my color come from my shadow?

In the gathering, the work is done with fingers. When many look, it feels like loneliness is my companion. When she dances with her hair, we seek a place to work. When the time comes, I will proudly hold my head high.
The eyes that have seen the fire burn my heart. The hands that have touched the flowers call out to me. The seven colors of the rainbow bring help. The white cloud takes away all the troubles.
If the river flows, it brings a cool breeze. If it comes from afar, it brings a distant sound like a gentle breeze.
All the days of the past change into a beautiful form. Even if I see her, she gives me everything.
When the sky's thirst is quenched, the time of the sea comes. When the time comes, the desire flows like a river.

With the touch of the fragrant hand, if life is taken away, it becomes a beautiful sky. If given in the eyes, it becomes a flower that doesn't fade. If it enters the heart, it becomes a wish that speaks.
